evidence.scientific_clarity: Force-directed layout with 4 community colors clearly shows community structure of 30-node network as briefed; edge alpha reduces hairball effect.
evidence.typography: Script sets neither pdf.fonttype=42 nor svg.fonttype=0; PDF embeds DejaVu Sans as Type3 (bitmap glyphs, non-selectable); default DejaVu Sans font used throughout.
evidence.palette: Uses Paul Tol qualitative palette (#4477AA, #EE6677, #228833, #CCBB44) — colorblind-safe; no directional color misuse for categorical community data.
evidence.layout_density: 6x6 inch canvas with tight_layout is reasonable; node labels (font_size=6, white) may be hard to read on smaller nodes; legend placement is clean.
evidence.reviewer_readiness: Caption matches figure content; legend present; title redundant with caption; no modularity or quantitative community metric cited to anchor the claim.
evidence.vector_fidelity: PDF uses Type3 font subtype (bitmap-traced glyphs) due to missing fonttype=42 setting — text is not selectable or editable in Illustrator/Inkscape.
evidence.file_format: All required files present and non-trivial: figure.pdf (17K), figure.png (105K), figure.svg (49K), caption.tex (337B), gen_figure.py (1.7K).
evidence.caption_quality: Caption names algorithm (Fruchterman-Reingold), node count (30), community count (4), and edge opacity rationale, but lacks any quantitative finding (e.g., modularity, edge counts per community).

overall_strengths: Colorblind-safe qualitative palette (Paul Tol) applied correctly to categorical community data with no directional color misuse.
All required output files are present and non-trivial; layout is clean with appropriate edge alpha and node sizing per the brief's anti-hairball hint.
overall_weaknesses: Missing pdf.fonttype=42 and svg.fonttype=0 settings cause Type3 bitmap font embedding — text is non-selectable in the PDF and the default DejaVu Sans is not publication-quality.

Caption describes the method but offers no quantitative finding (e.g., modularity score, intra- vs inter-community edge ratio) that would make it scientifically informative rather than purely descriptive.
